content:
My Etsy Picks: Patriotic

Next weekend is the Fourth of July! It’s one of my favorite days because we host an annual picnic on the banks of the river (7 years going strong!) and we sit, and eat, and drink, and hang out with friends until the fireworks go off over the Art Museum. It’s always an awesome day! These are some wonderful Etsy items that help bring out the patriotic side of me!

I may already have my outfit picked out for July 4th-

navy shorts, red and blue star tank top, and even a red, white and blue knotted headband I made just for the day

– but that won’t stop me from shopping for more patriotic items! Check out all the shops below, and the

original treasury right here

!

  1. That Crafty Auntie Em
  2. Creations By Ellyn
  3. Simply Marilee
  4. Miracle Shine
  5. Ellie Dee Designs
  6. Yesware
  7. Nature’s Doorway
  8. The Tank Top Shoppe
  9. Icabod’s Imagination
  10. Little Life Designs
  11. Katie Duran
  12. Anna Daisys Fabrics
  13. Nights Requiem
  14. Seaside Soap Kitchen
  15. KikiBows
  16. Take It Personal Gifts

I’m looking forward to another great holiday with friends on the banks! Hope your day is great, too!

Which 4th of July themed item do you like the best?
